SEARCH
Package model.user

Class Admin

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
model.user.Employee
model.user.Admin
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable
public class Admin extends Employee
System administrator. Manages users and sees action logs.
